instruction:
Products from a production line are packaged in boxes, with each box's weight being random. Assuming each box has an average weight of 50 kg and a standard deviation of 5 kg, how many boxes can each truck, with a maximum load capacity of 5 tons, carry at most to ensure the probability of not being overloaded is greater than 0.9779?

Options:
A. 90
B. 99
C. 105
D. 98
E. 97
F. 102
G. 95
H. 100
I. 93
J. 110
